description: Implement the child-graph strategy generator capability that converts a base resume, parsed job details, and optional user clarification answers into a synchronized human-readable strategy markdown document and strict ResumeDiffSchema. The feature must preserve hallucination safeguards by restricting edits to allowed resume sections, keeping immutable fields unchanged, and setting the child graph status to STRATEGY_DRAFTED when a valid strategy is produced.

userStories.title: Generate a synchronized strategy draft and resume diff
userStories.description: As a strategic job seeker, I want the agent to draft a human-readable tailoring strategy and exact resume diffs for one job so that I can understand every proposed resume change before approving it.
acceptanceCriteria: Given a ChildGraphState with base_resume, job_details, and optional user_clarification_answers when strategy_generator is invoked then it returns strategy_markdown, resume_diffs, and status set to STRATEGY_DRAFTED.
Given the LLM returns structured strategy output when strategy_generator completes then resume_diffs conforms to ResumeDiffSchema and strategy_markdown describes the same proposed changes.
Given user_clarification_answers are present when strategy_generator builds its prompt then those answers are included as high-priority tailoring guidance.
Given no clarification answers are present when strategy_generator builds its prompt then it still generates a strategy from base_resume and job_details without requiring HITL data.

tasks.description: Add a structured Pydantic output model for the strategy generator that contains strategy_markdown and ResumeDiffSchema-compatible changes without altering existing schema field names.
Create a dedicated src/nodes/strategy_generator_node.py module that uses ChatOpenAI with structured output and a prompt covering base_resume, job_details, and user_clarification_answers.
Re-export or delegate the existing child_nodes.strategy_generator stub to the new implementation while preserving the child graph node name strategy_generator.
Set the returned status to JobStatus.STRATEGY_DRAFTED or the exact string STRATEGY_DRAFTED consistently with existing node return patterns.
Add unit tests that mock ChatOpenAI structured output and verify strategy_markdown, resume_diffs, clarification-answer inclusion behavior, and status updates.

userStories.notes: Use gpt-4o for heavy reasoning, matching EvaluateFitNode. Keep field names aligned with src.schemas.ResumeDiffSchema and ResumeChange.

userStories.title: Enforce resume tailoring safety constraints in generated diffs
userStories.description: As a strategic job seeker, I want generated resume diffs to respect immutable resume facts and allowed edit sections so that the agent cannot hallucinate or silently alter factual identity, employment, or education data.
acceptanceCriteria: Given config resume_constraints are available in state when strategy_generator builds its prompt then allowed_sections_to_alter, forbidden_sections, and rules are included in the LLM instructions.

Given a generated diff targets forbidden sections such as name, contact_info, job_title, company, dates, or education when strategy_generator validates the output then the node rejects the unsafe output with a clear error.
Given a generated diff old_value does not match the referenced value in base_resume when strategy_generator validates the output then the node rejects the unsafe output with a clear error.
Given all generated diffs target allowed sections and old_value matches base_resume when validation runs then the node returns the validated ResumeDiffSchema.
Given validation fails when the node returns or raises then it must not mark status as STRATEGY_DRAFTED.

tasks.description: Inspect existing state typing and decide how to safely read optional config constraints from ChildGraphState without breaking current tests that omit config.

Implement deterministic section-path validation for ResumeChange.section values, supporting professional_summary, skills paths, professional_experience[n].highlights[n], and other allowed sections defined by config.
Implement old_value verification against base_resume for every replace action so the diff cannot patch a value that is not present at the target path.
Implement forbidden-section rejection for identity, contact, title, company, date, and education paths, using config constraints where present and safe defaults where absent.
Add tests covering allowed summary/highlight edits, forbidden immutable edits, mismatched old_value, and missing config fallback behavior.

userStories.notes: This story protects the hallucination-prevention requirement in PRD/TRD. Prefer deterministic validation before downstream ApplyChangesNode exists.

userStories.title: Verify strategy generation in the child graph flow
userStories.description: As a strategic job seeker, I want the child graph to advance from fit evaluation into strategy drafting reliably so that each isolated job application reaches the human review checkpoint with the proposed strategy ready for inspection.
acceptanceCriteria: Given evaluate_fit produces no clarification questions when the child graph runs then execution proceeds to strategy_generator before the human_review interrupt.
Given strategy_generator returns STRATEGY_DRAFTED when the child graph reaches human_review then the checkpointed state contains strategy_markdown and resume_diffs for review.
Given evaluate_fit produces clarification questions when the child graph runs then the existing clarification interrupt behavior remains unchanged.
Given strategy_generator is mocked in graph tests when the graph compiles then all existing child graph nodes and edges remain present.
uv run pytest tests/test_child_graph.py tests/test_strategy_generator_node.py passes.

tasks.description: Update child graph tests or add new graph-flow tests to mock strategy_generator output and verify the graph pauses at human_review with strategy data in state.
Ensure imports and node delegation keep existing tests for child_graph and evaluate_fit_node passing without changing unrelated graph topology.
Add an integration-style test for the no-clarification path from evaluate_fit through strategy_generator to the human_review interrupt using MemorySaver.
Add a regression test proving the needs-clarification path still interrupts before clarification and does not prematurely generate strategy output.
Run the required validation commands with uv and fix only issues directly caused by this feature's implementation.

userStories.notes: Do not implement HumanReviewNode behavior in this feature; F-12 covers the review UI and later features cover revision/apply/PDF generation.
